name: Sour Cream Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. In a small skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add onion and garlic to the skillet and sauté for a few minutes until softened.
4. Stir in paprika and mix well.
5. Dip each piece of chicken into the mixture and coat evenly.
6. Place the coated chicken pieces in a shallow baking dish.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes.
8. Cover with foil and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
9. Arrange drained hot broccoli around the chicken pieces.
10. Add sliced peaches on top of the broccoli.
11. Mix sour cream and mayonnaise in a small bowl.
12. Spoon the mixture over the chicken and broccoli.
13. Sprinkle with poppy seeds and grated Parmesan cheese.
14. Broil for 6 to 8 minutes until the cheese is melted and lightly golden.
